name: Khalid Al-Thani
whatsapp_message: مرحباً خالد! 👋 أتمنى أن تكون بخير. لاحظنا أنك حاصل على 62 في آخر اختبار وأنت حاضر بانتظام وهذا رائع! 🌟 لديك 6 أيام قبل الاختبار القادم - هل تحتاج إلى أي مساعدة أو شرح لأي جزء من المادة؟
action: Contact Khalid via WhatsApp today to introduce yourself, discuss his quiz performance, and offer targeted academic support for the next 6 days before his quiz.
reasoning: Khalid has never been contacted despite high risk status and a quiz score just above the passing threshold. His perfect attendance shows commitment, but he needs immediate facilitator engagement to prevent him from falling below passing before the next quiz.
